Hustlers (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $104,963,598Details
International Box Office $45,504,321
Worldwide Box Office $150,467,919
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,411,528
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,189,650
Total $5,601,178
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Hustlers follows a crew of savvy former strip club employees who band together to turn the tables on their Wall Street clients.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$33,181,361 (31.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.16 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,700,000 (worldwide box office is 7.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,250 opening theaters/3,525 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $137,048,528

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 13th, 2019 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: September 12th, 2019 (Wide), released as Стриптизёрши (Russia (CIS))
September 13th, 2019 (Wide), released as Zlatokopky (Czech Republic)
September 13th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
September 13th, 2019 (Wide), released as Да свалиш Уолстрийт (Bulgaria)
September 13th, 2019 (Wide), released as REVARANTKE NA WALL STREETU (Slovenia)
Video Release: November 26th, 2019 by STX Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive sexual material, drug content, language and nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2593 (Cert #52354), 8/28/2019)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Geographical setting: New York City
Social setting: Strippers / Stripping, Wall Street
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Time period setting: 2000s
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Gloria Sanchez, Nuyorican, STX Films, Annapurna Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
